name: Popcorn Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Put popped corn through coarse knife of food chopper.
2. Boil sugar, corn syrup, salt, and water to hard ball stage (265 - 270 F).
3. Add butter and boil to hard crack stage (285 - 290 F).
4. Add popped corn and stir until well blended.
5. Return to fire for a minute to loosen mixture.
6. Pour onto well-buttered baking sheet.
7. Roll with rolling pin as thin as possible.
8. Cut into squares.
